title: aquilegia viscosa subsp. montsicciana
intro: Aquilegia viscosa subsp. montsicciana, also known as the sticky columbine, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico. It is a member of the Ranunculaceae family and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Aquilegia viscosa subsp. montsicciana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
